meaning: n.微纤维(尤指普通显微镜下看不见的构成植物细胞壁的微纤维)
examples: Genetic variations on tracheid microfibril Angle of 55 Chinese fir clones were investigated.
Tensile strength is mainly controlled by tracheid length, tracheid strength, microfibril angle and crystalline degree etc.
The broad sense heritability estimates of clones varied between 0.734 and (0.867), indicating the microfibril angle was under strong genetic control.
